filtering_notes: Removed: junior/mid-level roles, sales/marketing roles, consulting/staffing agencies, crypto/Web3 companies (P2P.org, Libeara), banking VP titles (Citi), Musk-affiliated companies. Kept only VP/CTO/Head-level engineering leadership roles at companies meeting profile criteria.

relevant_jobs.title: Global Field CTO for AI Enterprise Strategy
relevant_jobs.summary: Cognition AI (makers of Devin) is looking for a Field CTO to lead technical strategy and customer engagement across APAC and MENA. Requires experience working with CxOs and deep understanding of software engineering workflows and AI.

relevant_jobs.title: VP of Engineering
relevant_jobs.summary: AI startup specializing in life sciences, founded in London and Tokyo in 2018. Drug and enzyme discovery using ML. No Japanese language requirement. Can apply from abroad.

relevant_jobs.title: VP Engineering, Academic Leaders & Funders Solutions
relevant_jobs.summary: Elsevier (RELX Group). Global leader in information and analytics for science and healthcare. VP Engineering role for Academic Leaders & Funders Solutions group delivering data-driven insights and platforms.

relevant_jobs.title: VP Engineering / CTO
relevant_jobs.summary: Building next-gen AI platform for complex industrial and physical systems. Hands-on VP/CTO role. Requires experience with distributed systems, edge-to-cloud architecture. Startup.

relevant_jobs.title: VP Product & Engineering
relevant_jobs.summary: AI-first FinTech scale-up launched 2023, operating across Europe and Americas. All-in-one OS for SMEs with banking, corporate cards, bill pay, financing. VP role combining product and engineering.

relevant_jobs.title: CTO
relevant_jobs.summary: Founding CTO for a well-funded, fast-growing tech company. Build next-gen digital platform across community, interactive, intelligent, and commerce capabilities. Define end-to-end technology strategy.

relevant_jobs.title: Vice President of Engineering
relevant_jobs.summary: AI-powered mental health care infrastructure. Structures psychiatric narratives, improves consultations, reduces documentation burden. Leading technical team. Early-stage.

relevant_jobs.title: CTO (AI and Software)
relevant_jobs.summary: CTO for government-related AI and software projects. Define long-term technical roadmap across AI, cloud, data. Report to CEO, managing ~20 people. Requires government security clearance. 5 days in office.

relevant_jobs.title: Chief Technology Officer
relevant_jobs.summary: AI-powered back office for skilled trades, starting with $50B+ HVAC industry. Just closed $5M seed round. Looking for technical leader for next chapter of growth.

relevant_jobs.title: Chief Technology Officer (AI CTO)
relevant_jobs.summary: Visionary AI CTO to lead technology strategy and develop AI-powered products. Combine deep technical expertise with leadership. Build scalable systems, manage teams, align tech with business goals.

relevant_jobs.title: VP of Engineering (CTO Candidate)
relevant_jobs.summary: CTO track VP of Engineering. Design and build engineer organizations, drive recruitment, maximize organizational performance.

relevant_jobs.title: VP of Engineering (AI-powered SaaS)
relevant_jobs.summary: Fast-growing Proptech scale-up seeking highly technical VP of Engineering to lead next-gen AI-powered SaaS platform.

relevant_jobs.title: VP of Engineering
relevant_jobs.summary: Report to CTO, lead engineering department, define technical strategy, scale teams. EdTech company.

relevant_jobs.title: VP Engineering
relevant_jobs.summary: Proptech company. 8+ years engineering experience, 3+ in leadership. Requires fluency in French and English.
